title: May 4
content:
<noinclude>
{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Rhere|May the 4th be with you|the saying [[May the Force be with you]]}}
{{Month|May}}
[[File:SWDayMay4th-Logo.svg|right|250px]]
'''May 4''' is the 124th day of the year (125th in leap years). There are 241 days remaining. It is often known as "'''Star Wars Day'''," and the accompanying phrase "May the Fourth be with you" is a reference to the ''[[Star Wars]]'' phrase "[[May the Force be with you]]."

The phrase dates back to at least [[1979]], on the day [[Wikipedia:Margaret Thatcher|Margaret Thatcher]] was elected the first female [[Wikipedia:Prime Minister of the United Kingdom|Prime Minister]] of the [[Wikipedia:United Kingdom|United Kingdom]]. Her party took out a newspaper ad in the [[Wikipedia:London Evening News|''London Evening News'']] that said ''"May the Fourth be with you, Maggie. Congratulations."''<ref name="Once upon">''[[Once Upon a Galaxy: A Journal of the Making of The Empire Strikes Back]]''</ref>

On [[May 2]]nd, [[2019]], the state of [[Wikipedia:California|California's]] legislature voted and officially declared May 4th as "Star Wars Day" in recognition of [[Star Wars: Galaxy's Edge|''Star Wars'': Galaxy's Edge]] opening later in the month of [[May]].<ref name="Official">{{WebCite|url=https://www.hollywoodreporter.com/news/california-makes-it-official-votes-declare-may-4-star-wars-day-1206925|text=California Makes It Official, Votes to Declare May 4 'Star Wars Day'|archivedate=20200506165520}}</ref>

Part of the [[2021]] edition included the commissioning of fan art from fifteen artists for a [[Disney+]] "takeover": [[Talisa Almonte]], [[Kwasi Amankwah]], [[Salvador Anguiano]], [[Salena Barnes]], [[Cryssy Cheung]], [[Chris Christodoulou]], [[Doaly]], [[Lekelefac Fonge]], [[AJ Frena]], [[Erin Gallagher]], [[Eddie Holly]], [[Monica M. Magaña]], [[Dorthea Taylor]], [[Cole Thompson]], and [[Zi Xu]].<ref name="SWD Artists">{{SW|url=news/disney-plus-star-wars-day-art-commentary|text=Meet the Artists Behind Disney+'s Stunning ''Star Wars'' Day Art}}</ref></noinclude>

*[[1930s|1939]] – [[Paul Gleason]] is born.
*[[1981]] – ''[[Star Wars (radio)|Star Wars]]:'' "[[The Luke Skywalker Initiative]]" aired on [[National Public Radio]].
*[[1985]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 98|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 98]] published.
*[[1998]] – ''[[I, Jedi]]'' published.
*[[2002]] – "[[A Jedi's Weapon]]" published as part of [[Free Comic Book Day]].
*[[2013]] – ''[[Star Wars: The Assassination of Darth Vader]]'' published as part of [[Free Comic Book Day]].
*[[2014]] – The first [http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=_soLH5MWGOg full-length trailer] for ''[[Star Wars Rebels]]'' is released.
*[[2016]] – [[Poe Dameron 2|''Poe Dameron'' 2]] published.
*2016 – "[[Attack of the Conscience]]" airs on [[Disney XD]].
*[[2017]] – ''[[Adventures in Wild Space: The Rescue]]'' published.
*2017 – [[Star Wars: A New Hope (paperback novel)|''Star Wars: A New Hope'']] published.
*2017 – [[Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back (paperback novel)|''Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back'']] published.
*2017 – [[Star Wars: Return of the Jedi (paperback novel)|''Star Wars: Return of the Jedi'']] published.
*2017 – ''[[Star Wars: The Doodles Strike Back]]'' published.
*2017 – ''[[Star Wars: The Force Awakens: Graphics]]'' published.
*2017 – ''[[Star Wars: The Force Awakens: A Junior Novel]]'' published in a new format in the U.K.
*2017 – [[James Cranna]] dies.
*[[2018]] – "[[Chopper and Friends]]" airs on YouTube.
*2018 – "[[Monster Misunderstanding]]" airs on YouTube.
*2018 – "[[Art History]]" airs on YouTube.
*2018 – "[[Porgs!]]" airs on YouTube.
*2018 – "[[Perilous Pursuit]]" airs on YouTube.
*2018 – "[[Traps and Tribulations]]" airs on YouTube.
*2018 – "[[A Disarming Lesson]]" airs on YouTube.
*[[2019]] – ''[[Star Wars Adventures Free Comic Book Day 2019]]'' released.
*[[2020]] – ''[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars]]'' series finale "[[Victory and Death]]" airs on [[Disney+]].
*2020 – ''[[Disney Gallery: The Mandalorian]]'' premieres on Disney+ with "[[Directing]]."
*2020 – [[Star Wars: Episode IX The Rise of Skywalker|''Star Wars'': Episode IX ''The Rise of Skywalker'']] premieres on Disney+.
*2020 – ''[[Star Wars Resistance]]'' [[Star Wars Resistance Season One|Season One]] premieres on Disney+ in the [[Wikipedia:United Kingdom|United Kingdom]] and [[Wikipedia:Ireland|Ireland]].
*2020 – ''[[Star Wars Resistance]]'' [[Star Wars Resistance Season Two|Season Two]] premieres on Disney+ in [[Wikipedia:Australia|Australia]] and [[Wikipedia:New Zealand|New Zealand]].
*2020 – ''[[LEGO Star Wars: All-Stars]]'' premieres on Disney+ in the [[Wikipedia:United Kingdom|United Kingdom]] and [[Wikipedia:Ireland|Ireland]].
*2020 – [[Doctor Aphra (2020) 1|''Doctor Aphra'' (2020) 1]] published digitally.
*2020 – The [[Star Wars: The Clone Wars - The Final Season (Episodes 9-12)|soundtrack]] for the last four episodes of ''[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars]]'' [[The Clone Wars: Season Seven|season seven]] released.
*[[2021]] – ''[[Star Wars: The Bad Batch]]'' premieres on Disney+ with "[[Aftermath (episode)|Aftermath]]."
*2021 – ''[[Star Wars Biomes]]'' premieres on Disney+.
*2021 – ''[[Star Wars Vehicle Flythroughs]]'' premieres on Disney+.
*2021 – ''[[Maggie Simpson in "The Force Awakens From Its Nap"]]'' premieres on Disney+.
*2021 – ''[[The Mandalorian: Magnetic Fun]]'' published.
*2021 – ''[[Star Wars: The Mandalorian: Volume 1]]'' published.
*2021 – ''[[Star Wars: The Skywalker Saga – The Official Collector's Edition]]'' published.
*2021 – ''[[Star Wars: Galactic Baking]]'' published.
*2021 – ''[[Star Wars Insider: The Fiction Collection Volume 1]]'' published.
*2021 – ''[[Star Wars: Scratch Artist]]'' published.
*[[2022]] – [[Obi-Wan 1|''Obi-Wan'' 1]] published.
*2022 – [[Star Wars (2020) 23|''Star Wars'' (2020) 23]] published.
*2022 – ''[[Behind the Mac: Skywalker Sound]]'' airs on YouTube.
*2022 – ''[[Disney Gallery: The Book of Boba Fett]]'' premieres on Disney+.
*[[2023]] – [[Star Wars: Visions Volume 2|''Star Wars: Visions'' Volume 2]] premieres on Disney+.
*2023 – ''[[Rogue Not Quite One]]'' premieres on Disney+.
*2023 – Episodes 1 - 7 of ''[[Star Wars: Young Jedi Adventures]]'' premieres on Disney+.
*2023 – "[[The Young Jedi / Yoda's Mission]]" and "[[Nash's Race Day / The Lost Jedi Ship]]" aired on [[Disney Junior]].
*[[2024]] – ''[[Star Wars: Tales of the Empire]]'' premieres on Disney+. 
*2024 – [[Free Comic Book Day 2024: Star Wars 1|''Free Comic Book Day 2024: Star Wars'' 1]] published.
*2024 – ''[[Free Comic Book Day 2024: All Ages]]'' published.
*[[2025]] – ''[[Star Wars: Tales of the Underworld]]'' premiered on Disney+
*2025 – [[Star Wars: Galaxy's Edge (special)|''Star Wars: Galaxy's Edge'' special]] premiered on Disney+.
*2025 – [[Star Wars: Rise of the Resistance (special)|''Star Wars: Rise of the Resistance'' special]] premiered on Disney+.
